title: Gaza flotilla activists allege abuse by Israeli forces while detained
summary_full: The detainees say they were slapped, hit, humiliated and even subjected to sexual violence, but Israel's prison service says the allegations are false.
summary_public: The detainees say they were slapped, hit, humiliated and even subjected to sexual violence, but Israel's prison service says the allegations are false.

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: Gaza flotilla activists allege abuse by Israeli forces
